aggregation.mean: Arithmetic mean across five frozen seeds.
aggregation.paired_far_improvement: 100 * (baseline_seed_MAE - FAR_seed_MAE) / baseline_seed_MAE, aggregated across paired seeds.
aggregation.sample_standard_deviation: Sample standard deviation across five frozen seeds with ddof=1.

metric_definitions.mae: Mean absolute error in raw traffic-speed units.
metric_definitions.mape_percent: Mean absolute percentage error multiplied by 100.
metric_definitions.rmse: Root mean squared error in raw traffic-speed units.
metric_definitions.wmape_percent: Sum absolute error divided by sum absolute target value, multiplied by 100.
